all.en: The Northbridge Institute is pleased to present its Certified Financial Analyst course.
all.zh: Northbridge 學院很榮幸推出財務分析師認證課程。

all.en: This professional program prepares candidates for the global CFA examinations.
all.zh: 本專業課程協助學員準備全球 CFA 考試。

all.en: The curriculum is designed by a panel of practicing senior analysts.
all.zh: 課程由現職資深分析師組成的委員會設計。

all.en: It is suitable for finance graduates and early-career investment professionals.
all.zh: 適合財金系畢業生及初入職場的投資專業人士。

all.en: The program runs over twelve months on a part-time evening schedule.
all.zh: 課程為期十二個月，採非全日制晚間時段授課。

all.en: Classes are held on Tuesday and Thursday evenings from six to nine.
all.zh: 課程於每週二、四晚間六點至九點進行。

all.en: Lectures take place at our central campus near Liberty Square Station.
all.zh: 課程於本校位於自由廣場站旁的市中心校區進行。

all.en: Live streaming is also available for students based outside the city.
all.zh: 外縣市學員亦可透過線上直播上課。

all.en: Each topic is delivered through lectures, problem sets, and case discussions.
all.zh: 每個主題均以講授、習題與案例討論的方式呈現。

all.en: Mock examinations are scheduled twice per term to track progress.
all.zh: 每學期安排兩次模擬考以追蹤學習進度。

all.en: Personalized feedback is provided after every major assessment.
all.zh: 每次重要測驗後皆會提供個別回饋。

all.en: Students gain access to our online library of more than four hundred lectures.
all.zh: 學員可使用本院線上資料庫中超過四百堂課程影片。

all.en: An on-demand question bank with over six thousand practice items is included.
all.zh: 課程亦包含含逾六千題練習的隨選題庫。

all.en: Group study sessions are organized every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 每週六上午安排小組讀書會。

all.en: All students are paired with a mentor working in the financial industry.
all.zh: 所有學員均配對一位現職金融業界導師。

all.en: Career services include resume reviews and mock interviews.
all.zh: 職涯服務包括履歷檢視與模擬面試。

all.en: Our placement rate among graduates has exceeded ninety percent for five years.
all.zh: 本院畢業生五年來就業率均超過 90%。

all.en: Tuition is payable in three installments throughout the year.
all.zh: 學費可分三期於一年內繳納。

all.en: Scholarships are available for outstanding applicants and women in finance.
all.zh: 本院為優秀申請者及金融女力提供獎助學金。

all.en: Corporate sponsorships from employers are also welcomed.
all.zh: 亦歡迎雇主提供企業贊助。

all.en: Applications open on August 1 and close on September 30.
all.zh: 報名自 8 月 1 日起至 9 月 30 日截止。

all.en: Required documents include transcripts, a resume, and a personal statement.
all.zh: 應備文件包括成績單、履歷及個人申請書。

all.en: Selected candidates will be invited to a short admissions interview.
all.zh: 通過初審者將獲邀參加簡短的入學面試。

all.en: Please visit our website or contact admissions@northbridge.edu for details.
all.zh: 詳情請瀏覽本院網站或洽 admissions@northbridge.edu。
